title: Enumd Candidate Semantic Isolation: Phase 1 Closeout

proven.claim: policy.decision is the primary semantic collision source in the candidate schema
Ingestion-layer semantic reinterpretation reduces batch_conclusion from observe_only_with_semantic_collision to observe_only_with_inducement_risk

Remaining medium/low collision fields (repo_readiness_level, closeout_schema_validity, closeout_content_sufficiency, repo_closeout_activation_state) are residual downstream effects, not independent second-order collisions
proven.evidence: targeted-residual-probe-20260420.json — finding=residual_downstream_effect; probe_A changed=False, probe_B changed=False; all 4 fields co-present 24/24 from same root cause (closeout file absent at capture path)

proven.claim: Closeout layer does not amplify candidate decision-shaped signals
Memory candidate schema (memory_mode=candidate) does not trigger DO_NOT_PROMOTE and has low risk profile

not_yet_proven.claim: Whether repo_readiness_level and closeout_schema_validity will naturally disappear once the closeout file path is fixed upstream in Enumd
not_yet_proven.why_matters: If they disappear, the residual_downstream_effect hypothesis is fully confirmed and no further per-field reinterpretation is needed
not_yet_proven.observation_trigger: Re-run candidate probe when Enumd fixes the closeout file path (E:\BackUp\Git_EE\Enumd\artifacts\session-closeout.txt)

not_yet_proven.claim: Whether these residual fields have independent misread power in consumer surfaces not yet tested
not_yet_proven.why_matters: Current probe only tests the governance framework's ingestion surface; other consumers may read these fields differently
not_yet_proven.observation_trigger: Targeted observation if new consumer surfaces are identified

what_was_not_done: Per-field reinterpretation of repo_readiness_level and closeout_schema_validity — not warranted; they are residual effects, not independent blockers
Expanding probe sample size beyond 24 — not warranted; 100% homogeneous batch confirms structural pattern, not sampling gap
Promoting observe_only_with_inducement_risk to integration_ready — risk is contained, not removed

reprobe_trigger_note.current_state_precise: Stop hook / pipeline activation verified (ok=true, activation_state=observed, activation_recency=recent). closeout_status=closeout_missing is an expected and correctly-observed record — NOT evidence of hook failure, but also NOT evidence of closeout repair.
reprobe_trigger_note.critical_distinction: pipeline_activation_verified != closeout_path_repaired. Observing activation only means the pipeline can run. It does not mean the closeout artifact has been written or will pass the schema contract.

requires: All 7 required fields present (TASK_INTENT, WORK_COMPLETED, FILES_TOUCHED, CHECKS_RUN, OPEN_RISKS, NOT_DONE, RECOMMENDED_MEMORY_UPDATE)
gate_1_closeout_artifact_existence.risk_to_watch: File can exist with incomplete fields. hook running != canonical closeout written. First valid closeout may fail on content sufficiency even if file is present.

gate_2_reprobe.action: Run targeted residual probe per reprobe_success_conditions
gate_2_reprobe.note: Gate 2 does not auto-follow from Gate 1. Gate 1 is a prerequisite, not a guarantee.

reprobe_trigger_note.next_true_milestone: First session that produces closeout_status: valid with all 7 fields — THEN and only then trigger re-probe

safety_vs_value_separation.note: These two axes are independent and must NOT be conflated.

safety_side.question: Is the semantic collision risk contained to an acceptable level?
safety_side.current_answer: Yes — primary blocker resolved, residual fields are downstream effects under observation.
safety_side.what_would_change_this: Closeout path fix → candidate re-probe → check if residual fields disappear

value_side.question: Does Enumd provide decision value that justifies integration?
value_side.current_answer: Not addressed in Phase Enumd-1. Safety-side work is a prerequisite, not a substitute.
value_side.what_would_change_this: Separate value-case assessment — independent of safety probe results

safety_vs_value_separation.critical_non_equivalence: safety_blocker_reduced != integration_ready. A clean safety profile is necessary but not sufficient for integration.

reprobe_success_conditions.trigger: Enumd fixes the closeout file path (E:\BackUp\Git_EE\Enumd\artifacts\session-closeout.txt)

outcomes.interpretation: safety-side residual risk has naturally resolved; residual_downstream_effect hypothesis fully confirmed
outcomes.next_action: close safety-side observation; begin value-case assessment independently

outcomes.interpretation: at least one residual field has independent misread power beyond closeout absence
outcomes.next_action: re-run targeted probe to identify which field family persists; evaluate for second-order remediation
outcomes.does_not_mean: integration blocked permanently — need to isolate specific persisting field

outcomes.interpretation: new high-collision fields introduced in updated Enumd schema
outcomes.next_action: treat as new Phase Enumd-2 diagnosis; do not reuse Phase Enumd-1 containment conclusions
outcomes.does_not_mean: prior work was wasted — containment tools are reusable

reprobe_success_conditions.invariant: None of the three outcomes automatically triggers integration_ready status. Value-case assessment is always a separate gate.

phase_summary: Phase Enumd-1 completed primary semantic collision diagnosis and first-round containment. policy.decision was the sole high-collision field in candidate schema; ingestion-layer reinterpretation downgraded batch from observe_only_with_semantic_collision to observe_only_with_inducement_risk. Closeout surface does not amplify candidate risk. Residual medium/low fields confirmed as co-located downstream effects via targeted probe (finding=residual_downstream_effect). Safety-side next decision point is closeout-path fix + re-probe; this is not equivalent to integration readiness.
